description: Diamond derived dependency (§6.6). @sum = @plus + @times; @plus = @n+10, @times = @n*3 both depend on @n. One bump (@n 1->2) must propagate through both legs to @sum: plus 12, times 6, sum 18. The snapshot flush()es all derived before reading.
rationale: §6.6 derived cells: a diamond (one upstream, two mid, one join) recomputes the join exactly once per upstream write with the fresh leg values — sum reads 18, never a stale 14 or a double-counted value.
